creator: kozos@kozos.jp
text:
Created attachment 251899
patch for 20231210a

> 1. you've two flavors: ...

I added three flavors: default(sdl2), nosdl, sdl1.
Makefile become very simple, thanks!

> 2. The SYSCALL, SYSTEM, and NETWORK options... 

These options are necessary to varidate system/syscall/network functions.
(-DUSE_SYSTEM_FUNCTION -DUSE_SYSCALL_FUNCTION -DUSE_NETWORK_FUNCTION are added in pre-processing)

> 3. NCURSES_MAKE_ARGS=<empty> - Can be USE_CURSES=yes... 

Yes, I do it.

> And I forgot in my comment: should check "portclippy Makefile" too... 

I checked "portfmt -D Makefile" and "portclippy Makefile".
